title: Insights | Stats NZ
content:
## Unemployment rate at 5.3 percent in the March 2026 quarter
New Zealand’s seasonally adjusted unemployment rate was 5.3 percent in the March 2026 quarter.

## Labour market statistics: March 2026 quarter
Labour market statistics provide a picture of the New Zealand labour market, including unemployment and employment rates, demand for labour, and changes in wages and salaries.

## Unemployment rate at 5.4 percent in the December 2025 quarter
New Zealand’s seasonally adjusted unemployment rate was 5.4 percent in the December 2025 quarter, compared with 5.3 percent in the previous quarter.

## Labour market statistics: December 2025 quarter
Labour market statistics provide a picture of the New Zealand labour market, including unemployment and employment rates, demand for labour, and changes in wages and salaries.

## Unemployment rate at 5.3 percent in the September 2025 quarter
New Zealand’s seasonally adjusted unemployment rate was 5.3 percent in the September 2025 quarter.

## Labour market statistics: September 2025 quarter
Labour market statistics provide a picture of the New Zealand labour market, including unemployment and employment rates, demand for labour, and changes in wages and salaries.

## Labour market statistics: June 2025 quarter
Labour market statistics provide a picture of the New Zealand labour market, including unemployment and employment rates, demand for labour, and changes in wages and salaries.

## Unemployment rate at 5.2 percent in the June 2025 quarter
New Zealand’s seasonally adjusted unemployment rate was 5.2 percent in the June 2025 quarter.

## Labour market statistics: March 2025 quarter
Labour market statistics provide a picture of the New Zealand labour market, including unemployment and employment rates, demand for labour, and changes in wages and salaries.

## Unemployment rate remains at 5.1 percent in the March 2025 quarter
The seasonally adjusted unemployment rate was 5.1 percent in the March 2025 quarter, unchanged from last quarter.

## Unemployment rate at 5.1 percent in the December 2024 quarter
Unemployment continued to grow, with the seasonally adjusted unemployment rate reaching 5.1 percent in the December 2024 quarter.

## Labour market statistics: December 2024 quarter
Labour market statistics provide a picture of the New Zealand labour market, including unemployment and employment rates, demand for labour, and changes in wages and salaries.
